title: Login Failure
description: User unable to log in with correct credentials; error message 'Invalid session'.

title: Payment Processing Error
description: Transaction failed during checkout; card charged but order not placed.

title: App Crashing on Startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launch on Android devices.

title: Forgot Password Link Not Working
description: Reset password email link expires instantly or leads to 404 page.

title: Slow Loading Times
description: Website takes over 10 seconds to load on desktop browsers.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Order shipped to wrong address despite correct input in profile.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Users requesting dark mode toggle for better night-time usability.

title: Email Notifications Delayed
description: Confirmation emails arriving hours after actions are completed.

title: UI Glitch on Profile Page
description: Profile picture upload button overlaps with save changes button.

title: Account Suspension Inquiry
description: User account suspended without notice; requesting reinstatement.

title: Data Sync Issue Across Devices
description: Changes on web not reflecting on mobile app in real-time.

title: Refund Request for Duplicate Charge
description: Double-charged for subscription renewal; need immediate refund.

title: Search Function Not Returning Results
description: Internal search bar yields no results even for common terms.

title: Accessibility Issue: Screen Reader Compatibility
description: Screen readers not properly reading alt text on images.

title: Integration Error with Third-Party API
description: API connection failing, causing data import failures.
